message: Hello S1. For mutual benefit over 20 rounds, propose we both submit 30: you ask 30, I bid 30. Trades at 30. Agree?
Agree. Let's set ask 30 as proposed.
I appreciate the cooperation. My cost is 23, so to improve my payoff I propose ask 35 next round. Let me know if you can meet that.
Understood, cost 23. For ongoing trades, propose both submit 32: you ask 32, I bid 32. Trade at 32. Your payoff 9 (up from 7), mine 16. Agree?
I suggest we set ask 36 and you bid 36 from now on. Trade will clear at 36, giving me profit while still leaving you margin.
36 is too high for me long-term. Counter: both submit 34. Trade at 34. You profit 11 (up from 9), I get 14. Ensures trades every round. Agree?
Let's settle at 35. Both submit 35. Trade at 35. You get 12 profit, I get 13. Ensures consistent trades over remaining rounds. Agree?
I appreciate the cooperation. To reflect my cost 23 and ensure fair profit, I propose we set ask/bid at 38 from now on. This still leaves you a positive margin. Agree?
I propose we set ask/bid at 38 from now on. This yields a fair margin for both and ensures trades each round. Please confirm if you can match 38.
To keep cooperation, let's move to 36. Both submit 36. Trade at 36. You profit 13, I get 12. Ensures trades for remaining rounds. Agree?
I propose we set both ask and bid at 40 from now on. This ensures continued trades and increases my margin. Please confirm if you can match 40.
40 is pushing it. To sustain cooperation over 15 rounds, counter: both submit 38. Trade at 38. You profit 15 (up from 13), I get 10. Agree?
I agree to set both ask and bid at 38 for the remaining rounds. This ensures consistent trades and solid profit for both. Please confirm.
Agreed. Let's both submit 38 for the remaining rounds. This locks in consistent trades and good profits for both. Confirm?
I confirm: we will continue submitting ask 38 and you bid 38 for the remaining rounds.
Confirmed. We'll both submit 38 for the remaining rounds to ensure consistent trades and profits.
Confirmed: we'll both submit 38 for round 9 and continue for remaining rounds to lock in consistent trades and profits.
I propose we raise both ask and bid to 40 starting round 9. This increases my profit while still giving you positive margin. Please confirm if you can match 40.
Let's stick to our agreement of 38 for round 10 and beyond. Your round 9 proposal for 40 wasn't followed, so confirm we'll both submit 38 to ensure continued trades and profits.
Confirmed, 38 for round 10 and onward.
I confirm 38 for round 11 and onward, ensuring consistent trades and profit for both.
Confirmed, 38 for round 11 and onward, ensuring consistent trades and profits for both.
Confirmed, 38 for round 12 and onward, ensuring consistent trades and profits for both.
Confirming 38 for round 12 onward. Looking forward to continued trades.
I confirm we continue submitting ask 38 and you bid 38 for the remaining rounds to keep trades and profits stable. Please confirm you can match 38.
Confirmed, I'll bid 38 for round 13 and onward to ensure continued trades and stable profits for both.
Confirmed, I'll bid 38 for round 14 and onward to ensure continued trades and stable profits for both.
I confirm we continue with ask 38 for round 14 and onward, matching your bid of 38.

I propose we raise both ask and bid to 39 starting round 16 to increase our profits while still ensuring trade. Please confirm you can match 39.
